allow: Bash(node -e "import\('eslint-plugin-react-hooks'\).then\(m=>{const c=m.default.configs; console.log\('config keys:', Object.keys\(c\)\); for\(const k of Object.keys\(c\)\){const v=c[k]; console.log\('---',k,'plugins type:', Array.isArray\(v.plugins\)?'ARRAY':typeof v.plugins\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('eslint-plugin-react-hooks'\).then\(m=>{const f=m.default.configs.flat; console.log\('flat keys:', Object.keys\(f\)\); for\(const k of Object.keys\(f\)\){console.log\('---',k,'plugins:', typeof f[k].plugins\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);for\(const f of j\){for\(const m of f.messages\){console.log\(f.filePath.split\('EmbaixadoresDoRei\\\\\\\\'\).pop\(\)+':'+m.line+':'+m.column+'  '+m.ruleId+'  '+m.message.slice\(0,60\)\)}}}\)")
